'''Kal Clancy''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and father of [[Taryn Clancy]]. He was disappointed that his daughter, when she grew up, chose a career with the [[Core Courier Service]] rather than a more dashing profession. Though he did not tell her, he grew to be proud of her. He was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Lassen]]''.<ref name="Retreat from Coruscant" />
